# Auto-generated boolean modifiers for technology-gated features
# These make technology requirements for scripted buttons and
# power bloc principles visible in the tech tree.

# Space Program building PM unlock modifiers
# These appear in PM tooltips so players know which journal entries each PM unlocks
country_sr_earth_orbit_program_bool = {
	color = good
	boolean = yes
}
country_sr_moon_mission_program_bool = {
	color = good
	boolean = yes
}
country_sr_mars_mission_program_bool = {
	color = good
	boolean = yes
}
country_sr_solar_colonization_program_bool = {
	color = good
	boolean = yes
}
country_sr_deep_space_exploration_program_bool = {
	color = good
	boolean = yes
}
country_sr_interstellar_mission_program_bool = {
	color = good
	boolean = yes
}
